name: Dream Mirror of Chaos
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>混</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>沌</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>夢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆめ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鏡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Fusion Summon 1 "Dream Mirror" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters you control as Fusion Material. If "Dream Mirror of Joy" is in a Field Zone, you can also use monsters in your hand as Fusion Material. If "Dream Mirror of Terror" is in a Field Zone, you can also banish monsters from your GY as Fusion Material. You can only activate 1 "Dream Mirror of Chaos" per turn.
eff: Fusion Summon 1 "Dream Mirror" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters you control as Fusion Material. If "Dream Mirror of Joy" is in a Field Zone, you can also use monsters in your hand as Fusion Material. If "Dream Mirror of Terror" is in a Field Zone, you can also banish monsters from your GY as Fusion Material. You can only activate 1 "Dream Mirror of Chaos" per turn.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Graveyard as Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon
